hyperedges.label: Frame processing flow via Redis Streams

nodes.label: One camera entry from Redis key cameras:{tenant_id} (JSON array).
nodes.norm_label: one camera entry from redis key cameras:{tenant_id} (json array).

nodes.label: Sub-stream is used for AI; fall back to main.
nodes.norm_label: sub-stream is used for ai; fall back to main.

nodes.label: Single GPU process. Runs all tenant cameras concurrently via asyncio;     YOLO i
nodes.norm_label: single gpu process. runs all tenant cameras concurrently via asyncio;     yolo i

nodes.label: Re-read enabled features so admin toggles apply without a restart.         Reuse
nodes.norm_label: re-read enabled features so admin toggles apply without a restart.         reuse

nodes.label: One ffmpeg `-f segment` process per camera (main stream, -c copy).     A watcher
nodes.norm_label: one ffmpeg `-f segment` process per camera (main stream, -c copy).     a watcher

nodes.label: RTSP pull via OpenCV with exponential-backoff reconnect.      One dead camera ne
nodes.norm_label: rtsp pull via opencv with exponential-backoff reconnect.      one dead camera ne

nodes.label: Local file source for tests. loop=True replays the file endlessly.
nodes.norm_label: local file source for tests. loop=true replays the file endlessly.

nodes.label: One tracked person in the current frame, with its zone membership.
nodes.norm_label: one tracked person in the current frame, with its zone membership.

nodes.label: Per-frame snapshot handed to every active plugin after geofencing.
nodes.norm_label: per-frame snapshot handed to every active plugin after geofencing.

nodes.label: Per-frame feature detector. One instance per worker; plugins own their     own s
nodes.norm_label: per-frame feature detector. one instance per worker; plugins own their     own s

nodes.label: People counting / occupancy. Produces no events — writes a throttled     metric
nodes.norm_label: people counting / occupancy. produces no events — writes a throttled     metric

nodes.label: Emits a `crowd` event when too many people are present at once.      Frame-wide
nodes.norm_label: emits a `crowd` event when too many people are present at once.      frame-wide

nodes.label: Loads the tenant's enabled feature plugins and dispatches each frame.      Enabl
nodes.norm_label: loads the tenant's enabled feature plugins and dispatches each frame.      enabl

nodes.label: Service / repack activity at a counter desk (ПВЗ).      Heuristic MVP: a track t
nodes.norm_label: service / repack activity at a counter desk (пвз).      heuristic mvp: a track t

nodes.label: Detects item taken/placed on a `shelf` zone by comparing the region to a     ref
nodes.norm_label: detects item taken/placed on a `shelf` zone by comparing the region to a     ref

nodes.label: Internal track event fed from worker after ByteTrack (pixel bbox).
nodes.norm_label: internal track event fed from worker after bytetrack (pixel bbox).

nodes.label: Geofencing + dwell tracking. process() is pure/sync (testable);     emit() and t
nodes.norm_label: geofencing + dwell tracking. process() is pure/sync (testable);     emit() and t

nodes.label: IDs of active zones whose polygon contains the normalized point.
nodes.norm_label: ids of active zones whose polygon contains the normalized point.

nodes.label: Emit zone_exit for tracks not seen within track_lost_seconds.
nodes.norm_label: emit zone_exit for tracks not seen within track_lost_seconds.

nodes.label: ViziAI — VMS-платформа видеоаналитики для ПВЗ и производств (РФ)
nodes.norm_label: viziai — vms-платформа видеоаналитики для пвз и производств (рф)

nodes.label: Развёртывание: домашний ПК (GPU-сервер) + VPS (публичная точка входа)
nodes.norm_label: развертывание: домашнии пк (gpu-сервер) + vps (публичная точка входа)

nodes.label: 7. Если пока остаёшься на Windows + WSL2 (не рекомендуется для прода)
nodes.norm_label: 7. если пока остаешься на windows + wsl2 (не рекомендуется для прода)

nodes.label: Установка Ubuntu Server 24.04 LTS на домашний ПК-сервер
nodes.norm_label: установка ubuntu server 24.04 lts на домашнии пк-сервер
